expected_pass.description: A draft spec with an unresolved CQ-promoted ND decision is a valid Gate B stopped state.
A review with blocking issues is schema-valid before Gate D pass is required.

expected_failure.description: An approved Gate B artifact root must include a Gate B approval audit block in status.md.
expected_failure.expected_message: status.md missing Gate B approval audit

expected_failure.description: An unresolved promoted CQ decision must remain in open_decisions until resolved.
expected_failure.expected_message: promoted decision ND-4 must be in open_decisions until it has a resolution

expected_failure.description: Task graph validation with --require-approved-spec must reject the draft spec.
expected_failure.expected_message: task graph generation is blocked until spec.approval is approved

expected_failure.description: Gate D pass validation must reject reviews with blocking issues.
expected_failure.expected_message: review cannot pass Gate D while blocking_issues is non-empty
